questions.stem_en: California's Basic Speed Law states that you should:
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州基本速度法規定您應該：

options.text_en: Always drive at the posted speed limit
Never drive faster than is safe for current conditions
options.text_zhHant: 任何時候都不得以超過當前路況安全速度行駛

options.text_en: Drive at least 10 mph below the speed limit
options.text_zhHant: 以至少低於限速10英里的速度行駛

options.text_en: Match the speed of surrounding traffic
options.text_zhHant: 與周圍車流速度保持一致

questions.explanation_en: California's Basic Speed Law states you must never drive faster than is safe for current conditions, regardless of the posted speed limit.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州基本速度法規定：無論標示限速為多少，任何時候都不得以超過當前路況安全速度行駛。
questions.explanation_zh: 加州基本速度法规定：无论标示限速为多少，任何时候都不得以超过当前路况安全速度行驶。

questions.stem_en: What is the default speed limit in a residential area?
questions.stem_zhHant: 住宅區的默認限速是多少？
questions.explanation_en: The speed limit in a residential area is 25 mph unless otherwise posted.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 住宅區限速為25英里/小時，除非另有標示。
questions.explanation_zh: 住宅区限速为25英里/小时，除非另有标示。

questions.stem_en: What is the speed limit in an alley?
questions.explanation_en: The speed limit in alleys is 15 mph.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 小巷中的限速為15英里/小時。
questions.explanation_zh: 小巷中的限速为15英里/小时。

questions.stem_en: What is the maximum speed limit on most California highways?
questions.stem_zhHant: 加州大多數高速公路的最高限速是多少？
questions.explanation_en: The maximum speed limit on most California highways is 65 mph. Some may be posted at 70 mph.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 加州大多數高速公路最高限速為65英里/小時。部分公路可能標示為70英里/小時。
questions.explanation_zh: 加州大多数高速公路最高限速为65英里/小时。部分公路可能标示为70英里/小时。

questions.stem_en: The speed limit near a school when children are present is:
questions.stem_zhHant: 學校附近有兒童時的限速是：
questions.explanation_en: The speed limit near schools when children are present is 25 mph. Note: Beginning January 1, 2031, the default school zone speed limit will change to 20 mph (AB 382), but the current limit remains 25 mph.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 學校附近有兒童時限速為25英里/小時。注意：從2031年1月1日起，學校區域預設限速將變更為20英里/小時（AB 382法案），但目前限速仍為25英里/小時。
questions.explanation_zh: 学校附近有儿童时限速为25英里/小时。注意：从2031年1月1日起，学校区域预设限速将变更为20英里/小时（AB 382法案），但目前限速仍为25英里/小时。

questions.stem_en: Near a railroad crossing where you cannot see tracks for 400 feet, the speed limit within 100 feet of the crossing is:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在無法看到400英尺範圍鐵軌的鐵路道口，距道口100英尺以內的限速是：
questions.explanation_en: Near railroad crossings where you cannot see tracks for 400 feet in both directions, the speed limit is 15 mph within 100 feet of the crossing.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在無法看到400英尺範圍鐵軌的鐵路道口，距道口100英尺以內限速為15英里/小時。
questions.explanation_zh: 在无法看到400英尺范围铁轨的铁路道口，距道口100英尺以内限速为15英里/小时。

questions.stem_en: The speed limit on a two-lane undivided highway is:
questions.stem_zhHant: 雙車道無隔離帶公路的限速是：
questions.explanation_en: The speed limit on a two-lane undivided highway is 55 mph unless otherwise posted.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 雙車道無隔離帶公路的限速為55英里/小時，除非另有標示。
questions.explanation_zh: 双车道无隔离带公路的限速为55英里/小时，除非另有标示。

questions.stem_en: Can you be cited for driving at the posted speed limit if conditions are poor?
questions.stem_zhHant: 如果路況不好，即使按標示限速行駛也可能被開罰單嗎？

options.text_en: No, you are always safe if under the posted limit
options.text_zhHant: 不會，只要不超過標示限速就安全

options.text_en: Yes, you may be cited for driving too fast for conditions
options.text_zhHant: 會，可能因速度不適合路況而被開罰單

options.text_en: Only if there is a special advisory speed sign
options.text_zhHant: 僅在有特殊建議速度標誌時

questions.explanation_en: You may be cited for driving too fast for conditions even if you are under the posted speed limit.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 即使未超過標示限速，如果速度對於當前路況過快，您也可能被開罰單。
questions.explanation_zh: 即使未超过标示限速，如果速度对于当前路况过快，您也可能被开罚单。

questions.stem_en: On a two-lane road, if 5 or more vehicles are following behind you, you should:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在雙車道公路上，如果有5輛或以上車輛跟在您後面，您應該：

options.text_en: Speed up to create more space
Ignore them and maintain your speed
options.text_zhHant: 忽略他們並保持您的速度

options.text_en: Pull to the right to let them pass
Apply your brakes to signal them to slow down

questions.explanation_en: On a two-lane road, pull to the right when 5 or more vehicles are following you. Driving too slowly can be as dangerous as driving too fast.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在雙車道公路上，如果有5輛或以上車輛跟在您後面，應靠右讓行。開車太慢可能和開車太快一樣危險。
questions.explanation_zh: 在双车道公路上，如果有5辆或以上车辆跟在您后面，应靠右让行。开车太慢可能和开车太快一样危险。

questions.stem_en: When driving near pedestrians and bicyclists, you should:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在行人和自行車騎士附近駕車時，您應該：

options.text_en: Reduce speed and be ready to stop
Speed up to pass them quickly

questions.explanation_en: When driving near pedestrians, bicyclists, or parked cars, reduce speed and be ready to stop. Expect the unexpected, especially around children.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在行人、自行車騎士或停放車輛附近駕車時，應減速並隨時準備停車。要預防突發狀況，尤其是在兒童附近。
questions.explanation_zh: 在行人、自行车骑士或停放车辆附近驾车时，应减速并随时准备停车。要预防突发状况，尤其是在儿童附近。

questions.stem_en: When towing a vehicle or trailer on a highway with four or more lanes in your direction, where must you drive?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在您方向有四條或以上車道的公路上拖車或拖掛行駛時，您必須在哪裡行駛？

options.text_en: In the two lanes closest to the right edge of the road
options.text_zhHant: 在最靠近右側路邊的兩條車道

questions.explanation_en: When towing and there are four or more lanes in your direction with no marked lanes for slower vehicles, you may only use the two rightmost lanes.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 拖車時，如果您的方向有四條或以上車道且沒有標記慢速車道，您只能使用最右邊的兩條車道。
questions.explanation_zh: 拖车时，如果您的方向有四条或以上车道且没有标记慢速车道，您只能使用最右边的两条车道。

questions.stem_en: Driving too slowly on a road where it is not safe can:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在不安全的情況下開車太慢可能會：

options.text_en: Be just as dangerous as driving too fast
Only be a problem on freeways
options.text_zhHant: 僅在高速公路上才是問題

questions.explanation_en: Driving too slowly can be as dangerous as driving too fast. If you are blocking the normal flow of traffic, move to the right lane.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 開車太慢可能和開車太快一樣危險。如果您阻礙了正常車流，應移至右側車道。
questions.explanation_zh: 开车太慢可能和开车太快一样危险。如果您阻碍了正常车流，应移至右侧车道。

questions.stem_en: What happens to fines for traffic violations in highway construction or maintenance zones when workers are present?
questions.stem_zhHant: 在有工人施工的公路建設或維護區域，交通違規罰款會怎樣？

options.text_en: Fines are reduced because of slower speeds
options.text_zhHant: 因為速度較慢所以罰款減少

questions.explanation_en: Fines for traffic violations in highway construction or maintenance zones can be doubled when workers are present.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在有工人施工的公路建設或維護區域，交通違規罰款可以加倍。
questions.explanation_zh: 在有工人施工的公路建设或维护区域，交通违规罚款可以加倍。

questions.stem_en: What should you watch for when driving through a construction zone?
questions.stem_zhHant: 通過施工區域時您應該注意什麼？

options.text_en: Construction workers, slow-moving equipment, and lane changes
options.text_zhHant: 施工人員、慢速移動的設備和車道變化

options.text_en: Only the posted speed limit signs

options.text_zhHant: 只注意周圍的其他車輛

questions.explanation_en: In construction zones, you should watch for construction workers, slow-moving equipment, and lane changes. Be prepared for sudden stops and changing road conditions.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在施工區域，您應注意施工人員、慢速移動的設備和車道變化。要做好突然停車和路況改變的準備。
questions.explanation_zh: 在施工区域，您应注意施工人员、慢速移动的设备和车道变化。要做好突然停车和路况改变的准备。

questions.stem_en: Speed contests (racing) on public roads can result in:
questions.stem_zhHant: 在公共道路上進行飆車比賽可能導致：

options.text_en: A warning for first-time offenders only
A small fine with no other penalties
options.text_zhHant: 少量罰款而無其他處罰

options.text_en: Fines, license suspension, and possible vehicle impoundment for up to 30 days
options.text_zhHant: 罰款、吊銷駕照，以及車輛可能被扣押最多30天

options.text_en: Penalties only if an accident occurs
options.text_zhHant: 僅在發生事故時才有處罰

questions.explanation_en: Speed contests (racing) on public roads are illegal. Penalties include fines, license suspension, and possible vehicle impoundment for up to 30 days.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 在公共道路上進行飆車比賽是違法的。處罰包括罰款、吊銷駕照，以及車輛可能被扣押最多30天。
questions.explanation_zh: 在公共道路上进行飙车比赛是违法的。处罚包括罚款、吊销驾照，以及车辆可能被扣押最多30天。

questions.stem_en: When driving through a work zone, you should:
questions.stem_zhHant: 駛過施工區域時，您應該：

options.text_en: Speed up to get through the zone quickly
options.text_zhHant: 加速盡快通過施工區域

options.text_en: Follow the vehicle ahead as closely as possible
Obey posted speed limits and watch for workers
options.text_zhHant: 遵守限速標誌並注意施工人員

options.text_en: Change lanes frequently to find the fastest route
options.text_zhHant: 頻繁變道以找到最快路線

questions.explanation_en: When driving through a work zone, obey the posted speed limits and watch for construction workers and slow-moving equipment. Be prepared for changing road conditions.
questions.explanation_zhHant: 駛過施工區域時，應遵守限速標誌並注意施工人員和慢速移動的設備。要做好路況變化的準備。
questions.explanation_zh: 驶过施工区域时，应遵守限速标志并注意施工人员和慢速移动的设备。要做好路况变化的准备。
